description: Money Services Business customer with cash-intensive currency exchange operations triggering Enhanced Due Diligence
parsed_text:
ENHANCED DUE DILIGENCE — MONEY SERVICES BUSINESS (MSB)
Legal Entity Name: GoldStream Currency Exchange Inc
Customer Type: Business
EIN: XX-XXX5560
Business Type: Money Services Business — Currency Exchange and Check Cashing
MSB Registration: FinCEN MSB Registration No. 31000XXXXX556
State License: Texas Department of Banking — License TX-MSB-XXXX3301, Exp: 2026-12-31
Business Address: 1802 W. Commerce Street, San Antonio, TX 78207, USA
Phone: (210) 555-0193   Email: compliance@goldstream.example
Business Activity: Retail currency exchange, check cashing, domestic and international money transmission
Source of Funds: Customer transaction fees, foreign exchange spreads
Expected Monthly Activity: $875,000

OWNERSHIP STRUCTURE
Beneficial Owner: Ricardo Salinas — Ownership: 80%
Beneficial Owner 2: Carmen Vela — Ownership: 20%
Control Person: Ricardo Salinas (CEO)

IDENTIFICATION DOCUMENTS
Ricardo Salinas — Passport: MX-XXXX4482, Exp: 2027-02-28
Carmen Vela — Driver License: DL-TX-XX9901, Exp: 2028-10-15

RISK FACTORS
- MSB: Inherently high-risk customer type per FFIEC guidance and FinCEN SAR typologies.
- Cash-intensive operations; significant volume of over-the-counter cash transactions.
- International money transmission corridors: USA-Mexico, USA-Guatemala.
- Prior FinCEN civil penalty (2019, $12,500) for delayed SAR filing; corrective action plan completed.
EDD Trigger: YES — MSB designation, cash intensity, and international transmission corridors.

EDD ACTIONS COMPLETED
1. FinCEN MSB registration verified and current.
2. State licensing reviewed — TX-MSB-XXXX3301 active.
3. AML program documentation reviewed; policies deemed adequate.
4. Independent audit report (2024) reviewed — no material findings.
5. Three years transaction reports (CTRs) reviewed for patterns.
6. Site visit conducted 2025-10-01; operations consistent with stated model.
7. Senior management approval obtained.
CDD Level: Enhanced
Risk Rating: High
Review Date: 2025-10-15   Reviewer: James Oduya
